message.content:
@startuml
title 基于GitHub的实验管理平台--删除用户用例的顺序图

actor "sysAdmin" as sysAdmin
boundary "maintainUsersWindow" as maintainUsersWindow
control "MaintainUsers" as MaintainUsers
entity "users" as users
database "数据库存储" as database

activate sysAdmin
activate maintainUsersWindow
activate MaintainUsers
activate users
activate database

sysAdmin -> maintainUsersWindow : 删除用户
maintainUsersWindow -> MaintainUsers : 删除用户请求
MaintainUsers -> users : 确认删除的用户信息
users -> database : 数据库存储实验数据

database --> users : 根据系统管理员删除的用户信息返回数据
users --> MaintainUsers : 根据系统管理员删除的用户信息返回数据
MaintainUsers --> maintainUsersWindow : 根据系统管理员删除的用户信息返回数据
maintainUsersWindow --> sysAdmin : 根据系统管理员删除的用户信息返回数据

sysAdmin -> maintainUsersWindow : 退出请求
activate maintainUsersWindow
maintainUsersWindow -> maintainUsersWindow : 保存退出
deactivate maintainUsersWindow

deactivate database
deactivate users
deactivate MaintainUsers
deactivate maintainUsersWindow
deactivate sysAdmin

@enduml
